/TEXT:DEF IS COMMITTED TO COALINGA STATE HOSPITAL PURS WI 6604; SEXUAL PREDATOR/COM6604/CALORD:03-08-06/X:RESPONDENT'S SIGNED WAIVER OF RIGHTS, WAIVER OF HEARING AND AGREEMENT TOEXTENSION IS FILED,/X:IT IS THEREFORE ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT BE COMMITTED TO COALINGA STATE HOSPITAL FOR THE TERM OF TWO YEARS, EXPIRING 02-07-08, FOR TREATMENT AND CONFINEMENT IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE PROVISIONS OF WELFARE & INSTITUTIONS CODE SECTION 6600, ET SEQ,/X:IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT IS REMANDED INTO THE CUSTODY OF THE SHERIFF OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TO BE DELIVERED TO THE DIRECTOR OF MENTAL HEALTH AT COALINGA STATE HOSPITAL,/
